tools.name: snapshots.completeSnapshot
tools.description: Seals and completes the snapshot after all of the required blocks of data have been written to it. Completing the snapshot changes the status to completed. You cannot write new blocks to a snapshot after it has been completed.

tools.name: snapshots.getSnapshotBlock
tools.description: Returns the data in a block in an Amazon Elastic Block Store snapshot.

tools.name: snapshots.listChangedBlocks
tools.description: Returns information about the blocks that are different between two Amazon Elastic Block Store snapshots of the same volume/snapshot lineage.

tools.name: snapshots.listSnapshotBlocks
tools.description: Returns information about the blocks in an Amazon Elastic Block Store snapshot.

tools.name: snapshots.putSnapshotBlock
tools.description:
Writes a block of data to a snapshot. If the specified block contains data, the existing data is overwritten. The target snapshot must be in the pending state.

Data written to a snapshot must be aligned with 512-KiB sectors.

tools.name: snapshots.startSnapshot
tools.description:
Creates a new Amazon EBS snapshot. The new snapshot enters the pending state after the request completes.

After creating the snapshot, use PutSnapshotBlock to write blocks of data to the snapshot.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
